queryLines: SELECT overall_score, completeness_score, accuracy_score, validity_score, consistency_score, uniqueness_score, timeliness_score, tables_below_threshold, pct_assets_monitored, total_tables, total_domains FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_org_score_latest

datasets.name: 14fb39c1
queryLines:
SELECT 
  dst.run_timestamp, 
  ROUND(AVG(dst.overall_score),2) AS overall_score, 
  ROUND(AVG(dst.completeness_score),2) AS completeness_score, 
  ROUND(AVG(dst.accuracy_score),2) AS accuracy_score, 
  ROUND(AVG(dst.validity_score),2) AS validity_score, 
  ROUND(AVG(dst.consistency_score),2) AS consistency_score, 
  ROUND(AVG(dst.uniqueness_score),2) AS uniqueness_score, 
  ROUND(AVG(dst.timeliness_score),2) AS timeliness_score,
  org.dq_threshold_min,
  org.dq_threshold_warning,
  org.dq_threshold_critical
FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_domain_score_trend dst
CROSS JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.organization org
GROUP BY dst.run_timestamp, org.dq_threshold_min, org.dq_threshold_warning, org.dq_threshold_critical
ORDER BY dst.run_timestamp

datasets.name: 801238e1
queryLines:
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT
    CASE
      WHEN NOT crr.passed THEN dc.column_id
    END
  ) AS failing_columns,
  COUNT(DISTINCT dc.column_id) AS total_monitored_columns,
  ROUND(
    100.0
      * COUNT(DISTINCT
        CASE
          WHEN NOT crr.passed THEN dc.column_id
        END
      )
      / COUNT(DISTINCT dc.column_id),
    2
  ) AS pct_columns_failing
FROM
  serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_result crr
    JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_assignment cra
      ON crr.assignment_id = cra.assignment_id
    JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_column dc
      ON cra.column_id = dc.column_id
    JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_latest_run lr
      ON crr.run_id = lr.latest_run_id

datasets.name: 2da9cd89
queryLines:
WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT
    domain_name,
    overall_score,
    run_timestamp,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY domain_name ORDER BY run_timestamp ASC) AS rn_first,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY domain_name ORDER BY run_timestamp DESC) AS rn_last
  FROM
    serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_domain_score_trend
)
SELECT
  f.domain_name,
  f.overall_score AS first_score,
  l.overall_score AS latest_score,
  ROUND(l.overall_score - f.overall_score, 2) AS score_change
FROM
  ranked f
    JOIN ranked l
      ON f.domain_name = l.domain_name
      AND l.rn_last = 1
WHERE
  f.rn_first = 1

datasets.name: 9f6037b5
queryLines:
SELECT
  table_name,
  domain_name,
  is_critical,
  overall_score,
  egregious_count,
  effective_threshold_min
FROM
  serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest
ORDER BY
  overall_score ASC
LIMIT 10

columns.description: 1 if table score is below min threshold, 0 otherwise
Percentage of rules that passed for each table
Yes if table is below minimum threshold, No otherwise

datasets.name: 6a7d3e73
queryLines:
SELECT
  a.alert_id,
  t.table_name,
  t.domain_name,
  d.dimension_name,
  a.alert_type,
  a.message,
  a.triggered_at
FROM
  serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_alert a
    LEFT JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest t
      ON a.entity_id = t.table_id
      AND a.entity_type = 'table'
    LEFT JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.quality_dimension d
      ON a.dimension_id = d.dimension_id
WHERE
  a.severity = 'critical'
  AND a.acknowledged_at IS NULL
ORDER BY
  a.triggered_at DESC

datasets.name: 3d99938b
queryLines:
SELECT
  tst.table_id,
  tst.table_name,
  tst.domain_name,
  tst.run_timestamp,
  tst.overall_score,
  ts.catalog_name,
  ts.schema_name,
  ts.overall_score AS latest_overall_score,
  ts.effective_threshold_min
FROM
  serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_score_trend tst
    JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts
      ON tst.table_id = ts.table_id

columns.description: Yes if table is currently below minimum threshold

datasets.name: ea981bad
queryLines:
SELECT
  ts.table_name,
  ts.domain_name,
  ts.catalog_name,
  ts.schema_name,
  c.column_name,
  r.rule_name,
  r.rule_type,
  r.rule_description,
  qd.dimension_name,
  r.default_severity_weight,
  crr.passed,
  crr.total_records,
  crr.failed_records,
  crr.failure_rate,
  crr.raw_score,
  crr.weighted_score,
  crr.egregious_flag,
  crr.evaluated_at,
  crr.executed_rule_sql,
  ts.overall_score,
  ts.effective_threshold_min
FROM
  serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_result crr
    JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_assignment cra
      ON crr.assignment_id = cra.assignment_id
    JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_column c
      ON cra.column_id = c.column_id
    JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts
      ON c.table_id = ts.table_id
    JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_rule r
      ON cra.rule_id = r.rule_id
    JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.quality_dimension qd
      ON r.dimension_id = qd.dimension_id
    JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_latest_run lr
      ON crr.run_id = lr.latest_run_id

columns.description: Yes if table is below minimum threshold

datasets.name: 0ef517d6
queryLines:
SELECT
  a.alert_id,
  a.severity,
  a.alert_type,
  a.message,
  a.triggered_at,
  a.acknowledged_at,
  ts.table_name,
  ts.domain_name,
  ts.catalog_name,
  ts.schema_name,
  ts.is_critical,
  ts.overall_score,
  ts.effective_threshold_min,
  qd.dimension_name,
  bo.owner_name AS acknowledged_by_name,
  bo.department,
  DATEDIFF(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), a.triggered_at) AS alert_age_days,
  CASE
    WHEN a.acknowledged_at IS NULL THEN 'Open'
    ELSE 'Acknowledged'
  END AS status,
  CASE
    WHEN
      a.severity = 'critical'
      AND ts.is_critical
    THEN
      1
    WHEN a.severity = 'critical' THEN 2
    WHEN
      a.severity = 'warning'
      AND ts.is_critical
    THEN
      3
    WHEN a.severity = 'warning' THEN 4
    ELSE 5
  END AS priority_rank
FROM
  serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_alert a
    JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts
      ON a.entity_id = ts.table_id
      AND a.entity_type = 'table'
    LEFT JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.quality_dimension qd
      ON a.dimension_id = qd.dimension_id
    LEFT JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.business_owner bo
      ON a.acknowledged_by = bo.owner_id
ORDER BY
  priority_rank ASC,
  alert_age_days DESC

columns.description: Yes if table is below minimum threshold

datasets.name: fdd802ab
queryLines:
SELECT
  c.column_id,
  c.column_name,
  c.data_type,
  c.is_nullable,
  c.is_primary_key,
  c.is_foreign_key,
  ts.table_name,
  ts.domain_name,
  ts.catalog_name,
  ts.schema_name,
  ts.overall_score,
  ts.effective_threshold_min
FROM
  serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_column c
    JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts
      ON c.table_id = ts.table_id

columns.description: Yes if table is below minimum threshold

datasets.name: critical_compliance
queryLines:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_critical_tables,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN overall_score >= effective_threshold_min THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS meeting_threshold,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN overall_score < effective_threshold_min THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS failing_threshold,
  ROUND(
    100.0
      * SUM(
        CASE
          WHEN overall_score >= effective_threshold_min THEN 1
          ELSE 0
        END
      )
      / COUNT(*),
    1
  ) AS pct_critical_meeting_threshold
FROM
  serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest
WHERE
  is_critical = true

frame.title: Org Data Quality Scores by Data Quality Dimension
Most Egregious Violations — Lowest Scoring Tables
Business Critical Tables Failing Quality Threshold
Tables Ranked by Data Quality Score

lines: # Organization Level (The 30,000-foot view) ## Trust & Health * What is our overall data quality score, and how has it trended over the last 30/60/90 days? * What percentage of our critical data assets meet quality thresholds? * How many active data quality incidents exist right now, and how many are overdue for resolution? ## Risk & Exposure * Which business processes or decisions are currently running on data that fails quality standards? * What is the estimated business impact (revenue, compliance risk, operational cost) of current quality gaps? * Are any regulatory or compliance-sensitive domains at risk? ## Progress & Accountability * Which teams own the worst-performing domains, and are they trending up or down? * What is our mean time to detect and resolve data quality issues? * How many issues were opened vs. closed this period?

## Data Domain Level
*Finance, Clinical, Claims, Imaging, etc.*

### Completeness
- What percentage of required fields are populated? Which critical fields are missing most often?
- Are source systems delivering complete records, or are there upstream gaps?

### Accuracy & Validity
- What share of values fall outside expected ranges or fail validation rules?
- How does this domain's data compare against authoritative reference sources or golden records?

### Timeliness
- Is data arriving on schedule? What is the average and worst-case latency from source to available?
- What percentage of records are stale beyond acceptable thresholds?

### Consistency
- Where does this domain's data conflict with the same entities in other domains (e.g., patient demographics across clinical vs. claims)?
- Are definitions and formats applied uniformly across source systems?

### Uniqueness
- What is the estimated duplicate rate for key entities (patients, providers, accounts)?
- Are deduplication and MDM processes keeping pace?

### Lineage & Coverage
- What percentage of data assets in this domain have documented lineage and ownership?
- Are there unmapped or ungoverned data sources feeding downstream analytics?
